title: Umami Fluffy Indian Mushroom Curry
description: A rich and indulgent Indian curry featuring roasted mushrooms and a deep umami flavor, made vegan-friendly with a chicken stock cube alternative. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: Toss the mushrooms with a little oil and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
In a large pan, heat some oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Stir in the curry powder and garam masala and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato puree, coconut milk, and dissolved stock cube to the pan. Bring to a simmer.
Add the roasted mushrooms to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Season the curry with salt to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve over rice or with naan bread.
